case_title: BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION VS DIZON, MARLON B.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-18-1996, DENIED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIZON, MARLON B.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIZON, MARLON B. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,292.33 FILED BY BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DIZON, MARLON B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF APPEAL BY FED EX FILED BUT NOT PROCESSED INFORMED B OF A PLFT HAS NO RIGHT TO APPEAL CASE.
